_comment: SYNTHETIC target graph for T4 Case A (PARTIAL/FAIL). Mirrors the REAL target_graph.json shape (domains -> {package, components, entities}; components keyed by class NAME). The XService component carries an `implemented_rules` array (the per-rule evidence the FIXED compare_graphs reads) covering RULE-001, RULE-002 and VAL-001 with STRONG evidence -- but DELIBERATELY OMITS ERR-001. An uncovered error_path can never PASS (per compare_spec step 4), so REQ_X must score PARTIAL/FAIL with 'ERR-001' in uncovered_rule_ids even though the class exists and 3/4 rules are covered.

_design.COVERAGE: Covers RULE-001, RULE-002, VAL-001 (3 of REQ_X's 4 rule ids). ERR-001 (the error_path) is missing -> blocking uncovered error_path -> never PASS.
_design.EVIDENCE_STRENGTH: All three covered ids are 'strong' (test_ledger tier) so the ONLY reason this is not PASS is the missing error_path, isolating the error_path-blocks-PASS behavior the T4 eval asserts.
_design.ITEM_SHAPE: implemented_rules items follow the target_graph_spec: {rule_id, source, evidence_strength, file_path, line_range}; rule_id matches ^(RULE|VAL|ERR)-[0-9]{3}$.
